name: python3-billiard
title: python3-billiard
summary: Multiprocessing Pool Extensions for Python (Python3 version)
description:
Multiprocessing Pool Extensions for Python (Python3 version)
This package contains extensions to the multiprocessing Pool.
It extends the multiprocessing.Pool with a billiard.pool.DynamicPool
that can grow in size.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-billiard because Multiprocessing Pool Extensions for Python (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-billiard as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-billiard with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-billiard --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
